scripts.dev: lsof -ti:1530 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; set -a; . ./.env.app 2>/dev/null; set +a; cargo build --bin mhaol-server && { PORT=1530 cargo run -p mhaol-backend --bin mhaol-server & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap 'kill $BACKEND_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; echo 'Waiting for backend on port 1530...'; until curl -s http://localhost:1530/api/ytdl/status > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; echo 'Backend ready.'; pnpm -r --filter mhaol-video dev; }
scripts.start: lsof -ti:1530 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; set -a; . ./.env.app 2>/dev/null; set +a; { PORT=1530 ./target/release/mhaol-server & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap 'kill $BACKEND_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; echo 'Waiting for backend on port 1530...'; until curl -s http://localhost:1530/api/ytdl/status > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; echo 'Backend ready.'; pnpm -r --filter mhaol-video preview; }
scripts.dev:backend: set -a; . ./.env.app 2>/dev/null; set +a; PORT=1530 cargo run -p mhaol-backend --bin mhaol-server
scripts.build: cargo build --release --bin mhaol-server && pnpm -r --filter mhaol-video build
scripts.test: pnpm -r run test && cargo test -p mhaol-backend
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaol-backend
scripts.install:deps: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev libonig-dev libgstreamer1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-base1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-bad1.0-dev gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav
